ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "input" TEXT /* Input or steps to execute the test case */,
  "expected_results" TEXT /* Expected results of the test case */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass or fail status of the test case */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test case */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of test case (functional, performance, security, etc.) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test case */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "test_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the test plan */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the test plan belongs to */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the test plan belongs to */,
  "test_plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test plan */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test plan was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test plan */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test plan was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (in progress, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  "release_manager" TEXT /* Name of the release manager */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Status of the release (in progress, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_execution" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test plan the test case belongs to */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was executed */,
  "executor" TEXT /* User who executed the test case */,
  "execution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test case execution */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defect related to the test case execution (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_execution_defect_id FOREIGN KEY ("defect_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_execution_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_execution_test_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("test_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that identified the defect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the defect (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* User who reported the defect */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was reported */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the defect */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "environment_status" TEXT /* Status of the test environment (available, in use, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the data belongs to */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the test data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of test data (input, expected result, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
